value.stringValue: Autolaunch - Patient Agreement - Upload Files to EHR Flow Content Version Collected

actionCalls.name: Log_ERROR_API_Call_NOT_Success
actionCalls.label: Log - ERROR - API Call NOT Success

value.stringValue: Autolaunch - Patient Agreement - Upload Files to EHR Flow Started

actionCalls.name: Log_Get_All_Patient_Agreement_Error
actionCalls.label: Log Get All Patient Agreement Error

actionCalls.name: Log_Get_Selected_Patient_Agreement_Error
actionCalls.label: Log Get Selected Patient Agreement Error

actionCalls.name: Log_Info_API_Call_not_Success
actionCalls.label: Log - Info - API Call not Success

value.stringValue: Autolaunch - Patient Agreement - Upload Files to EHR Flow is Missing ContentDocumentLink
Autolaunch - Patient Agreement - Upload Files to EHR Flow is Missing eligible Patient Agreements
Autolaunch - Patient Agreement - Upload Files to EHR Flow Started
Autolaunch - Patient Agreement - Upload Files to EHR Flow Patient Agreement Collected

assignments.description: To make the list comma separated we will add the comma before the next id
assignments.name: Add_Comma_to_EHR_Collection
assignments.label: Add Comma to EHR Collection

assignments.name: Add_EHRId_s_to_the_Patient_Agreement
assignments.label: Add EHRId's to the Patient Agreement

assignments.name: Add_Patient_Agreement_to_Collection_to_Be_Updated
assignments.label: Add Patient Agreement to Collection to Be Updated

assignments.description: Tag Format: [ "PA", "<patient agreement type picklist value>", "<patient agreement name>", "<patient agreement configuration UUID>" ]
assignments.name: Set_EHR_Tags
assignments.label: Set EHR Tags

assignments.name: Set_Output_Values_Failed_to_Get_All_Patient_Agreements
assignments.label: Set Output Values - Failed to Get All Patient Agreements

value.stringValue: Failed to get All Patient Agreements for patient

assignments.name: Set_Output_Values_Failed_to_Get_Specific_Patient_Agreements
assignments.label: Set Output Values - Failed to Get Specific Patient Agreements

value.stringValue: Failed to get Specific Patient Agreements for patient

assignments.name: Set_Output_Values_No_Account_Id_Present
assignments.label: Set Output Values - No Account Id Present

assignments.name: Set_Output_Values_No_ContentDocumentLink_Present
assignments.label: Set Output Values - No ContentDocumentLink Present

assignments.name: Set_Output_Values_No_eligible_Patient_Agreements_Present
assignments.label: Set Output Values - No eligible Patient Agreements Present

assignments.name: Set_selected_Patient_Agreement_Collection_Queried
assignments.label: Set selected Patient Agreement Collection - Queried

assignments.description: Instead of updating the entire object we are going to use selected fields.
assignments.name: Setup_Patient_Agreement_to_Be_Updated
assignments.label: Setup Patient Agreement to Be Updated

collectionProcessors.name: Filter_Content_Document_Link_for_Patient_Agreement
collectionProcessors.label: Filter Content Document Link for Patient Agreement

decisions.name: Are_there_Content_Documents_to_Delete
decisions.label: Are there Content Documents to Delete

decisions.name: Are_There_Content_Versions_to_Upload
decisions.label: Are There Content Versions to Upload

decisions.description: Here we check if the collection is blank or not. If the collection is not then we need to add a comma between each id.
decisions.name: Is_EHR_String_Collection_Blank
decisions.label: Is EHR String Collection Blank

decisions.description: If the Collection is filled in this means that we need to grab all Patient Agreements that are not approved and synced and attempt to sync them.
decisions.name: Is_Patient_Agreement_Collection_Filled_In
decisions.label: Is Patient Agreement Collection Filled In

decisions.description: We need to check that an account was passed in as that will determine if we can get the patient agreements or not.
decisions.name: Was_Account_Passed_In
decisions.label: Was Account Passed In

Flow.interviewLabel: Autolaunch - Patient Agreement - Upload Files to EHR {!$Flow.CurrentDateTime}
Flow.label: Autolaunch - Patient Agreement - Upload Files to EHR

recordLookups.name: Get_All_Patient_Agreement_s_For_Patient
recordLookups.label: Get All Patient Agreement's For Patient

recordLookups.name: Get_Content_Document_Link_for_Patient_Agreements
recordLookups.label: Get Content Document Link for Patient Agreements

recordUpdates.description: this will auto close any of the tasks that were open for the 10X team to reach out and get the client to sign the patient agreement.
recordUpdates.name: Close_Open_Tasks_for_Patient_Agreement
recordUpdates.label: Close Open Tasks for Patient Agreement

transforms.name: Get_List_of_Content_Document_Id_s
transforms.label: Get List of Content Document Id's

transforms.name: Get_List_of_Patient_Agreement_Id_s
transforms.label: Get List of Patient Agreement Id's

transforms.name: Get_List_of_selected_Patient_Agreement_Id_s
transforms.label: Get List of selected Patient Agreement Id's

variables.description: This will house the patient agreement ids that need to be uploaded to drchrono.
variables.name: col_txtPatientAgreementIds
